nodes.title: The PM Group’s Full Service Advertising Agency Offerings are the Driving Force Behind Our Client Growth
San Antonio Sports Showcases All-American Bowl and All-Star Game
The PM Group Adds New Restaurant Client to Agency Family

pageContext.content:
Marking an evolution in the Babe’s public media strategy, managers Tony Jr. and Alexandra Dempsy were excited to show off their delicious food and awesome offers on local TV.  Being on the show gave Babe’s the chance to let the public know about their delivery options and on-the-spot food preparation to boost game day snacking or kickoff party catering.
 
Boasting four San Antonio Locations, legendary Alamo City restaurant chain and The PM Group client, Babe’s Old-Fashioned Food has served fresh food in family-owned locations across town since 1987. Although Babe’s has been offering quality food for decades, Babe’s has now partnered with Grub Hub and Uber eats in an effort to target party hosts and game-day meal preparation needs.
 
Babe’s is well renowned around San Antonio as an old-fashioned restaurant with high standards. The management likes to say, “We wouldn’t make anything that we wouldn’t love to eat daily.” The famous burgers are the obvious staple, especially given the daily special deal including a freshly-made burger, fresh-cut fries, and a cold drink for just $7.79 every day.
 
Recently, they announced an exciting new spin on one of their classic offers that kids eat free any day of the week! With the purchase of an adult entrée, a kid’s meal is free at Babe’s, all day long. Babe’s began as a family-centric eatery and they want to reinforce this by helping to make feeding the entire family more affordable. “Babe’s has always been affordable and delicious, but now it’s even more so with kids eating free,” said General Manager Tony Jr.
 
Mastering the art of pizza, fresh salads, and fried chicken, Babe’s offers a well-rounded menu that is sure to offer something enjoyable for everybody. With such competitive pricing and quality food, Babe’s is confident that they will continue on for years as a San Antonio favorite.
 
Check out their moment in the spotlight here.
 
About The PM Group: The PM Group was founded in 1988. Over the past 30 years, the agency has continued to grow and is currently listed as San Antonio’s Largest Advertising Agency by the San Antonio Business Journal. The PM Group’s client roster spans numerous industries including automotive, CPG, entertainment and sports marketing, legal, business services, non-profit, real estate and fitness. In addition, the agency hosts an annual Charity Gala every February that to date has raised over $2.5 million for local San Antonio area nonprofit organizations in the last 15 years! It is our way of giving back to the community that we so humbly serve.
